text.title: AI User Story Decomposition Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Apply per single AI-product ask. Never batch multiple unrelated asks ('chatbot + recommender + summarizer') through one decomposition.
rule.rationale: Batching turns 1-decision artefact into a debate club. Each ask gets its own decomposition so rationale is traceable.

rule.statement: Every input has declared type and source (sponsor email, JTBD record, product brief link). Free-form prose without citation rejected.
rule.rationale: Untyped inputs let the BA hallucinate plausible-but-wrong AC. Typed + sourced inputs make output falsifiable.

rule.statement: Output explicitly draws the AI-vs-deterministic boundary per acceptance criterion. ACs that say 'AI does X' without naming the deterministic fallback rejected.
rule.rationale: Stakeholders default to 'LLM solves it'. Naming the boundary surfaces what deterministic infra is still needed.

rule.statement: Every AI behavior MUST ship ≥1 numeric eval criterion (precision/recall/accuracy/cost-per-request/latency-p95) as acceptance criterion. 'AI should be accurate' is rejected.
rule.rationale: Without numeric AC, AI feature ships and no one knows if it works. Numeric AC becomes the regression test.

rule.statement: Every AI behavior has a named fallback when AI fails (low confidence, refusal, timeout, cost cap). Missing fallback is blocked.
rule.rationale: AI fails frequently in long tail; without named fallback the UX breaks silently.

rule.statement: Output includes ≥5 golden-set seed examples per AC (input + expected + anti-output) to bootstrap evaluation.
rule.rationale: Story without seeds shifts golden-set creation to eng; BA closer to stakeholder language produces better seeds.

rule.statement: Skip for deterministic-only stories OR stories with measurable spec already in place OR research spikes with no production deploy plan.
rule.rationale: Methodology overhead is justified by AI-content + production-deploy intent.
